name: Smoked Chicken Roulade with Dried Fruits And
recipeIngredient: 20 ounces Boneless chicken breasts (skinned and boneless)
Salt and pepper to individual taste
1 cup Finely diced dried fruits (apples, cherries, pineapple, apricots, and raisins)
recipeInstructions:
STEP ONE: Prepare the Filling - Prepare 1 cup finely diced dried fruits (mix of apples, cherries, pineapple, apricots, and raisins). In a food processor, combine diced chicken meat, Port wine, egg whites, skim milk, salt, and pepper. Process until a mousse forms. Transfer to a bowl and mix in the diced dried fruits.
STEP TWO: Prepare the Roulades - Flatten the chicken breasts and place the filling in the center of each. Roll up tightly. Place the roulades in a smoker and cook until done.
STEP THREE: Prepare the Sauce - In a small saucepan, combine Veal stock and Bourbon. Cook for three minutes.
STEP FOUR: Presentation - To serve, cut the chicken rolls at an angle into five or six pieces. Spoon the sauce over the chicken.
Note: Recipe by Elmar Prambs of the Riverside Cafe, Austin, TX.
